description: During a review, an accountant finds several vendor checks that were issued over a year ago but have never been cashed.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all outstanding checks that are more than 180 days old.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces a list of stale-dated checks.

nodes.task_description: Perform due diligence by attempting to contact the vendors to have them cash the checks or request a reissue.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends notification letters to the vendors.

nodes.task_description: For checks that remain uncashed after the due diligence period, prepare to remit the funds to the state as unclaimed property, following escheatment laws.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent prepares the necessary report and payment for the state comptroller's office.
